negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_b8e4a9ab-164f-4451-ae3d-e1536a24fb52
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, showing a suburban street intersection under clear blue skies. A white SUV is stopped at the crosswalk, facing right, while a large white delivery truck is positioned to its front left, also waiting to proceed. The road curves gently to the right, bordered by sidewalks and residential houses with variously colored roofs and fences. Trees line the streets, adding greenery to the scene. A pedestrian wearing dark clothing is crossing the street near the right side of the frame, moving away from the camera's perspective. A "No U-Turn" sign is visible on the right side of the road, indicating traffic regulations for the intersection.  As the video progresses, the ego vehicle begins to move forward, slowly advancing through the intersection. The delivery truck remains stationary, maintaining its position to the front left of the SUV. The pedestrian continues their crossing, moving further down the sidewalk towards the right side of the frame. The ego vehicle turns right after a pedestrian crosses the street. During this turn, the reflection of nearby trees becomes visible on the hood of the ego vehicle. The camera angle remains fixed, capturing the gradual movement of the vehicles and the pedestrian as they navigate the intersection. The surrounding environment, including the trees, houses, and road markings, remains static throughout the sequence. By the final frame, the SUV has moved further into the intersection, while the pedestrian has almost reached the far side of the street. The delivery truck still waits in the front left of the SUV, and the "No U-Turn" sign remains prominently displayed. A speed limit of 25 is also indicated both on a sign board at the right side of the road and painted directly onto the surface of the road.
